items.en: Research Fellow / Data Scientist, Department of Medicine, Vanderbilt University Medical Center (Feb 2024 – Present). Advisor: Dr. Marcela Brissova.

items.en: AI-driven Computational models for islet biology and diabetes.

items.en: Knowledge-graph–based integration of genomic, epigenomic, transcriptomic, and 4D-genome data.

items.en: Chromatin 3D structural pattern analysis.

items.en: Ph.D. in Bioinformatics, University of Michigan – Ann Arbor, Department of Computational Medicine and Bioinformatics (Sep 2018 – Dec 2023). Advisor: Dr. Jie Liu.
